title: Dual expert review + comprehension test ('not medical advice')
context: M5 CONDITIONAL gate. Both a credentialed oncologist (ONC) and a patient-advocate (ADV) must sign off, with veto = block, plus an advocate comprehension test, before the explainer can merge. Patient-facing oncology content is high risk. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Run dual expert review (oncologist + patient-advocate) and an advocate comprehension test of the explainer, gating merge on both sign-offs.
acceptanceCriteria: Comprehension-tested with an advocate panel; 0 instances read as medical advice.
Both oncologist and patient-advocate sign-off recorded before merge (veto = block).
If either expert vetoes or the comprehension test fails, the explainer is blocked from merge.
